a:I[5878,["310","static/chunks/310-3f33d6a97cfc3ded.js","878","static/chunks/878-dbfa2cbdd3c38aab.js","537","static/chunks/app/concerts/%5Bslug%5D/page-b53e91132b9dacfa.js"],"Image"]
b:Tdec,<p>Ten ordinary boys, driven by dedication and a genuine love for performance.</p><p>When DICE steps onto the stage, they become more than performers &mdash; they reveal who they truly are. Through powerful energy, honest expression, and their unique individuality, every performance becomes a moment that connects deeply with the audience.</p><p>As artists, DICE continues to prove that passion, hard work, and authenticity can turn an ordinary beginning into something unforgettable.</p><p>__________________________________________________</p><p>⚡️𝐃𝐈𝐂𝐄 𝐅𝐀𝐍𝐂𝐎𝐍: 𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐃𝐈𝐂𝐄𝐜𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐲 𝐢𝐧 𝐇𝐨 𝐂𝐡𝐢 𝐌𝐢𝐧𝐡 𝐂𝐢𝐭𝐲⚡️</p><p><br></p><p>DICE đ&atilde; sẵn s&agrave;ng để mang mọi người đến với một h&agrave;nh tr&igrave;nh kh&aacute;m ph&aacute; ho&agrave;n to&agrave;n mới th&ocirc;ng qua &acirc;m nhạc, niềm vui v&agrave; những khoảnh khắc bất ngờ m&agrave; bạn chưa từng chứng kiến bao giờ!&nbsp;</p><p><br></p><p>Biết đ&acirc;u&hellip; đ&acirc;y kh&ocirc;ng chỉ l&agrave; kh&aacute;m ph&aacute; một kh&iacute;a cạnh kh&aacute;c của DICE m&agrave; c&ograve;n l&agrave; việc nhận ra tr&aacute;i tim của bạn c&oacute; thể &ldquo;loạn nhịp&rdquo; thế n&agrave;o khi đến gần hơn với họ 💓</p><p><br></p><p>Sẵn s&agrave;ng để ghi lại những khoảnh khắc, h&ograve; reo thật to v&agrave; tạo n&ecirc;n những kỷ niệm kh&oacute; qu&ecirc;n tại Th&agrave;nh phố Hồ Ch&iacute; Minh 🇻🇳✨</p><p>___</p><p><br></p><p>10 หนุ่ม DICE พร้อมแล้วที่จะพาทุกคนออกเดินทางสู่การค้นพบครั้งใหม่ ผ่านเสียงเพลง ความสนุก และโมเมนต์สุดเซอร์ไพรส์ที่ไม่เคยเห็นที่ไหนมาก่อน!</p><p><br></p><p>บางที&hellip;การค้นพบครั้งนี้</p><p>อาจไม่ใช่แค่การได้รู้จักอีกด้านของ DICE</p><p>แต่เป็นการค้นพบว่าหัวใจตัวเองเต้นแรงได้ขนาดไหนเวลาอยู่ใกล้พวกเขา💓</p><p><br></p><p>เตรียมเก็บทุกโมเมนต์ กรี๊ดให้สุด แล้วไปสร้างความทรงจำดี ๆ ด้วยกันที่ Ho Chi Minh City🇻🇳✨</p><p>___</p><p><br></p><p>DICE are ready to take everyone on a journey to a brand-new discovery through music, fun, and surprise moments you&rsquo;ve never seen anywhere before!</p><p><br></p><p>Maybe&hellip; this discovery won&rsquo;t just be about getting to know another side of DICE</p><p>but about discovering just how fast your heart can race when you&rsquo;re close to them 💓</p><p><br></p><p>Get ready to capture every moment, scream your hearts out, and make unforgettable memories together in Ho Chi Minh City 🇻🇳✨</p><p><br></p><p>⚡️TICKET SALE DATE: 20 JUNE 2026 10AM (GMT+7) via ticketmelon.com</p><p>🎲 TICKET PRICE: VND4,770,000 / VND2,570,000 / VND450,000</p><p>⚡️SHOW DATE: 29 AUGUST 2026</p><p>🎲 SHOW TIME: 2PM</p><p>⚡️VENUE: C30 THEATRE</p><p><br></p><p>#TheDICEcoveryinVN</p><p>#DICEAsiaTour</p><p>#DICE_SONRAY</p><p>#SONRAYMUSIC</p><p>#LeayDoDee</p>e:{"d":"M8 2v4","key":"1cmpym"}
